common.offline: You are offline. Reconnect to continue.

home.title: One permanent tap.
home.description: One secure NFC link can open the exact destination you select, and you can change it at any time.
home.featureTokenText: No private contact data is written to the NFC tag.
home.featureQrText: One managed short link works on physical and printed media.
home.featureSafeText: Pause, mark lost, or disable a card instantly.

auth.title: Welcome back
auth.description: Manage every smart card from one secure place.
auth.invalid: Email or password is incorrect, or the account is suspended.

dashboard.description: A live view of your smart cards, profiles, and engagement.
dashboard.profileHint: Add a title, bio, and contact methods.

status.notFoundText: This short code is unknown or was entered incorrectly.
status.pausedText: This smart card is currently paused.
status.lostText: The owner has marked this smart card as lost.
status.disabledText: This smart card is no longer active.
status.fallbackText: This card does not have an active destination. Ask its owner to configure it.
status.unavailableText: This public profile is currently unavailable.

plans.limitReached: You reached the limit for this plan.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.
errors.invalidFile: This file type is not allowed.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file is larger than the allowed limit.
errors.missingProfile: The profile is missing. An administrator can repair this account.

pwa.offlineText: Public pages already visited may remain available. Sign in and admin data require a connection.
